{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230552378F854DF458E847DBEB55"}"},"total":158},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7267163579386889000","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"挺不错的，前面几本婚姻写实的都看了，感觉女主性格都类似是一种性格，不知道是不是作者本人曾经有过这样类似的经验，总体看起来真实情感细腻，不错，也记住了书里面的荷塘小县城与其发生的一系列故事[赞][赞]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1692018424,"group_id":"7255519230752197692","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0j3CYIoHTYfQFbbZwiDVQlqO6g831Y5DCX29EoouQXr","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776787248&x-signature=NtetCP%2BD2YPkYr6bl%2BJMa04hBGU%3D","user_id":"1222308798152347","user_name":"紫鸳殿的孔武"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1222308798152347","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1692657776,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7255519230752197692","book_info":{"abstract":"结婚十年，秦笑笑一直走在买房“安家”的路上。小两口省吃俭用存了10万块钱，想买套二手房安家时，公公一场大病掏空所有。
买房计划落空，希望被打碎，夫妻矛盾，婆媳矛盾与日俱增。她绝望，懊悔。熬过了绝境后，把日子过的有声有色。一个女人从青春年少到中年妇女的沧桑巨变。身在炼狱，心向光明。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d7076b555577ab74c1640dd83928ac72","author":"浅夏忘归","author_id":"","book_id":"7255519230752197692","book_name":"三十岁女人带娃离异后","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#402818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1858人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":750,"name":"职场婚恋","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=750&name=职场婚恋&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":127,"name":"职场","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=127&name=职场&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":125,"name":"家庭","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=125&name=家庭&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":34,"name":"婚恋","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=34&name=婚恋&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7255575728224371239","read_count":"1858","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1438206"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"704","tags":"职场婚恋,现代言情,家庭,职场,婚恋","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/a559b72cdd1bde118f34237a528fec42~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779400357&x-signature=1BCKA7iXO4MYCSXNReDZBzn9NXA%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"60267117603","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"4.0676e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230552378F854DF458E847DBEB55"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":34,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":14778,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":18845,"reply_count":9,"show_pv":12881},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1692018676,"author_reply_time":1692018833,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7264196311691625277","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"亲爱的兄弟姐妹们，新书新鲜出炉，欢迎大家来捧场，也十分感谢大家的捧场和支持！一路走来，有友友们的陪伴和认可，就是写下去的动力。一如既往婚姻现实言情风，催婚，买房，教育，爱情，生活压力等，面对这些困难时，看书中人如何破茧重生！嘿嘿，快来围观吧！希望大家喜欢！","text_exts":[{"e":111,"s":107,"text":"破茧重生","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%A0%B4%E8%8C%A7%E9%87%8D%E7%94%9F&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177421635747DBEB55%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227264196311691625277%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227255519230752197692%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%A0%B4%E8%8C%A7%E9%87%8D%E7%94%9F%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1691327619,"group_id":"7255519230752197692","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"90小作者一枚。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyPlYyZoZj+yQ2q5VCrlRcU=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/b36b57ff10af415a821a16b575ee43a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795655&x-signature=JoLj4GacrmbGN2MXRzkaRelXYZs%3D","user_id":"60267117603","user_name":"浅夏忘归"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"60267117603","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_4","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.4","title_id":"author_level_4"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_tit
